name: M & R Transportation Inc

name: Worhunsky Corp
owner_or_parent: All-Star Transportation (Dufour family) - All-Star is portfolio company of Beacon Mobility, owned by Audax Private Equity
districts_or_customers: Wolcott, Plymouth, Thomaston, and Winchester CT
recent_news: Acquired by All-Star Transportation in December 2014 (announced 12/15/2014). All-Star itself is part of Beacon Mobility, an Audax Private Equity portfolio company; Beacon was reportedly in a second-round sale process per 2024-2025 reporting
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Acquired by All-Star Transportation in 2014; All-Star is part of Beacon Mobility (Audax PE). Remove from prospect list - this is a competitor platform asset.

name: Big Blu Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Summit School District (Breckenridge/Frisco/Dillon, CO) area - unconfirmed; Summit SD historically operates its own buses, suggesting Big Blu may be a private/charter/SPED supplemental provider
recent_news: No public news, M&A activity, or website found despite 66-employee scale. Summit SD operates its own transportation per district website
fit_notes: Sole mountain-resort-region operator in CO at meaningful scale (66 employees, ~$2.8M rev). Unusual location for a school bus contractor since Summit SD self-operates - may be charter/activity/SPED niche or resort employee shuttle mis-classified as school bus. Requires direct call to confirm services and target attractiveness.
